name: Private Fairway Highwood
about: Private Fairway Highwood is an indoor golf facility providing 24-hour access to TrackMan-equipped studios. The venue focuses on serious golf practice and improvement, offering memberships with unlimited access or punch passes. Members can lower their official handicap by 6-10 strokes using the TrackMan system, which provides complete club and ball data analysis. The facility features key fob entry and a mobile app for booking and managing sessions, with a policy of limited monthly memberships to ensure good access times for all players.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan technology provides complete club and ball data for every swing
24-hour access allows for flexible practice and play scheduling
Limited membership ensures good availability and access to tee times
Digital key fob and mobile app for easy booking and studio access

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor system for all bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, the website mentions bringing your own clubs for both the free trial and regular sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, there is no mention of BYOB or outside food being permitted at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time required to complete 18 holes, but sessions are booked in 50-minute increments.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the facility is geared toward serious golf practice and improvement, with no mention of junior programs or family-friendly features.
